name: Ubiquiti RJ45 Inline Coupler Outdoor, 2-Pack
title: Ubiquiti RJ45 Inline Coupler Outdoor, 2-Pack
description: The Ubiquiti RJ45 Inline Coupler Outdoor (UACC-RJ45-Coupler-C6A-Outdoor) is a compact and reliable solution designed to extend Ethernet connections in outdoor and harsh environments while maintaining full signal integrity. Engineered with a durable polycarbonate housing, this inline coupler offers excellent resistance to impact and environmental stress, ensuring long-lasting performance during outdoor deployments. Its IPX6-rated construction provides strong protection against heavy water exposure, making it suitable for use in areas subject to rain or high humidity conditions. With dimensions of Ø20 × 93 mm and a lightweight 19 g build, the coupler is easy to integrate into tight spaces or existing cable routes without adding unnecessary bulk. It fully complies with ANSI/TIA-568-D.2 standards, guaranteeing compatibility with professional Ethernet cabling systems and ensuring consistent network reliability. Ideal for surveillance systems, outdoor access points, and long-distance Ethernet runs, this 2-pack set offers a convenient, weatherproof way to extend or repair cable lines in the field. Whether used for temporary setups or permanent installations, the UACC-RJ45-Coupler-C6A-Outdoor provides dependable performance and robust protection for mission-critical networking applications.
